--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local V={"\073\047\076\080","\084\105\122\118","\115\085\052\089\106\066\090\105\113\090\111\061","\072\056\050\087\081\085\053\052\081\106\066\113\106\048\050\078\099\074\081\061","\118\105\051\105\086\111\061\061","\109\052\070\118\055\083\078\069\119\101\061\061","\097\082\082\065\080\086\101\061","\086\067\068\122\100\120\068\069";"\054\068\049\065\075\101\061\061","\066\121\087\043\082\121\066\098\090\122\049\053\072\121\066\074\072\121\066\119\090\112\061\061","\074\078\067\119\112\066\110\061";"\085\098\087\073\065\057\088\061";"\081\119\108\085\097\080\076\061";"\088\111\072\117\101\069\088\061","\113\102\085\051\054\068\084\061","\066\111\048\098\115\085\118\101\087\089\061\061","\086\075\102\117\112\116\047\069\052\077\078\078\048\069\103\067\122\066\122\088\113\100\098\105\097\113\078\121\109\111\061\061","\047\101\101\066","\049\085\106\061";"\068\068\118\097";"\103\075\080\050","\090\089\079\066","\057\052\051\080\113\052\105\122","\081\047\120\100\078\075\078\098\116\121\114\084\099\054\104\108\101\102\056\088","\115\090\113\110\069\049\078\090\116\071\072\121\056\082\101\061","\101\089\065\057\086\043\090\104\115\072\070\056\070\050\113\086\057\073\054\053\077\112\061\061";"\100\115\089\077\082\071\052\119\103\120\055\077\073\087\049\082\106\112\061\061";"\055\104\051\088\068\071\065\097\043\102\074\055\098\053\119\068\086\087\110\099\082\101\061\061","\049\070\048\103\112\089\061\061","\102\118\070\099\118\110\085\057";"\073\086\065\116\054\081\050\119\098\118\106\097\071\051\088\061","\103\085\087\079\057\111\061\061";"\107\077\075\080\086\080\051\103\105\116\106\081\069\085\122\061","\069\110\088\085\103\081\119\122\100\077\120\084\083\103\054\099\087\116\065\047","\115\056\109\104\084\101\061\061","\097\122\053\073\047\097\117\049\103\053\111\056\117\097\047\116";"\115\071\108\082\090\111\061\061";"\106\120\048\080\069\065\101\070\070\055\048\055","\117\081\088\069\120\113\065\098\116\112\061\061","\072\121\109\065\072\085\056\108\047\115\090\061","\054 9\053\089\079\061","\075\071\073\097\111\075\090\117\088\069\065\081\049\105\104\090","\082\065\073\053";"\105\119\081\085\074\111\061\061","\113\104\072\101\119\111\061\061";"\069\071\049\105\050\098\112\067\053\083\082\061";"\099\088\098\103";"\048\069\075\056\055\071\086\101\043\112\061\061";"\071\114\047\120\073\112\061\061","\107\065\053\089","\115\067\118\121\076\065\054\087","\115\085\122\100\105\112\068\073\106\067\102\068\077\116\054\047\043\111\061\061";"\043\113\106\080";"\086\069\087\086\111\089\061\061","\043\078\073\050\086\066\072\076\118\101\061\061","\082\075\066\079\103\085\066\079\084\115\049\050\084\073\113\053";"\100\090\048\065\086\049\090\061","\110\121\074\098\054\118\047\090\072\084\089\061";"\101\081\073\112","\082\049\047\101\054\102\043\089\099\081\119\061","\078\099\055\098\102\047\100\080";"\072\085\068\101\084\085\117\070","\051\071\083\083","\090\085\102\076\101\047\051\116\122\114\070\088\101\056\052\068\111\106\076\090","\107\051\120\102\069\114\070\106\118\079\100\066\100\101\061\061";"\050\100\048\075","\081\071\102\087","\083\084\077\052","\080\077\087\056\117\086\072\080\111\101\101\084\110\056\115\090\071\067\052\079\075\111\061\061","\109\065\113\050\051\055\052\047\076\049\084\070\053\120\100\056","\047\048\117\056\084\089\061\061";"\051\121\066\049";"\119\122\078\047";"\075\053\077\065\077\101\105\086";"\055\072\113\084\111\110\057\043\076\047\082\056\114\049\077\113\087\122\116\056\071\078\070\107\118\074\050\065\057\112\061\061";"\106\120\072\047\066\048\087\050\077\115\117\065\117\075\056\119\097\074\084\061";"\090\112\122\117\067\111\101\118\098\120\088\061","\069\105\113\090\089\070\070\088\080\074\106\105\081\103\102\116\107\111\061\061";"\104\115\048\085\069\111\061\061","\115\056\109\076\047\085\110\061","\099\069\056\112\067\086\076\101\110\057\115\050\057\083\080\121";"\114\084\067\055\114\077\122\108\085\089\061\061","\076\103\043\054\097\107\081\119\075\048\118\113","\113\052\048\078\101\112\061\061";"\117\102\11 "\070\074\067\116","\072\121\087\120\057\101\061\061","\066\073\066\074\072\121\109\098\081\089\061\061";"\066\072\087\112\102\119\086\066\112\113\110\061";"\052\056\099\052\050\057\116\114\050\089\076\078\115\110\071\043";"\081\069\053\055\122\120\104\115\113\066\072\105\122\052\081\061";"\080\075\069\110\047\083\077\068\082\068\071\074\116\098\104\084\047\119\108\073";"\066\108\118\065\114\056\102\061","\117\121\050\118\077\085\053\098\084\119\049\098\097\106\050\048\117\066\106\061","\102\053\083\052\113\073\053\116\080\106\102\077\090\083\122\072\110\048\111\076\119\065\108\107\073\055\081\106\102\111\061\061","\102\105\069\078\084\047\109\048\089\090\103\089\067\080\085\078\109\077\106\075","\113\113\067\066\075\090\085\043\078\079\098\080\072\106\086\088\078\079\051\110\102\071\069\077\081\047\102\118\106\111\061\061";"\086\085\079\043\072\111\078\118\065\098\088\083\114\088\120\069","\122\117\106\097","\115\056\109\078\103\073\049\053\099\111\061\061","\102\089\117\098\108\054\121\069\069\070\068\120\102\082\107\122\108\101\061\061";"\090\054\054\110";"\106\054\114\056";"\120\049\052\087\065\056\053\052\119\072\079\061","\112\105\075\115","\121\080\083\108\047\111\061\061";"\121\116\069\109\115\112\061\061","\067\111\056\089\079\104\075\089\069\070\106\061";"\079\099\115\108","\075\047\086\101\112\055\110\061","\114\097\121\083\107\111\061\061";"\051\111\048\088\082\103\112\087\052\111\088\073\099\115\122\061","\050\097\082\122\072\112\061\061";"\097\121\087\083\103\122\071\043\097\085\053\071\082\052\118\101\066\121\106\061";"\083\070\120\104\051\112\061\061";"\081\072\098\067\066\102\106\050";"\077\043\119\070\104\109\080\078\112\109\106\061","\078\090\086\103\099\087\057\100";"\077\110\120\047\053\115\087\113\089\089\061\061","\051\107\097\079\107\069\100\086\051\121\122\071\113\101\061\061","\082\073\066\043\103\048\047\053";"\067\053\050\049\108\084\077\106\052\082\081\076\107\101\061\061";"\084\119\078\085\047\073\050\110\103\119\089\056\112\073\101\079 return(function(V,Q,H,s,U,v,R,d,Y,l,g,r,m,O,z,x,p,F,G,j,B,k,y)g,B,m,d,j,G,O,y,Y,l,z,F,x,p,k,r=function(V,A)local Q=O(A)local H=function(H)return p(V,{H},A,Q)end return H end,function(V,A)local Q=O(A)local H=function(H,s,U,v,R,k,F)return p(V,{H;s;U;v;R,k;F},A,Q)end return H end,function(V,A)local Q=O(A)local H=function(H,s)return p(V,{H,s},A,Q)end return H end,function(V,A)local Q=O(A)local mZ,h,dZ,l,L,c,UZ,xZ,lZ,Z,I,K,e,n,R,X,t,z,q,OZ,W,P,zZ,a,D,o,F,f,sZ,kZ,jZ,i,QZ,S,pZ,HZ,w,E,T,rZ,GZ,N,VZ,b,vZ,FZ,O,M,AZ,G,u,C,RZ,J while p do if p<9151013-194226 then if p<-2859+4278274 then if
